kinds.name: mock
kinds.title: Mock data
kinds.description: Synthesized stand-in data shown until the real source is wired (then delete it).

kinds.name: stub
kinds.title: Stub
kinds.description: Placeholder implementation/behaviour that is not real logic yet.

kinds.name: unenforced
kinds.title: Unenforced
kinds.description: A limit, rule, or contract field declared before it is enforced in code.

kinds.name: todo
kinds.title: Todo
kinds.description: Planned work that is not built yet.

kinds.name: hack
kinds.title: Hack
kinds.description: A deliberate shortcut that works but should be revisited.

kinds.name: fixme
kinds.title: Fixme
kinds.description: A known defect: code that is wrong or fragile and needs a real fix.
